understanding.goal_understanding: Place each selectable piece onto the goal tile(s) marked with a '+'. If there are multiple '+' tiles, all of them must be occupied by selectable pieces at the same time to trigger WIN and complete the game/run within the step budget.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: A piece must be selected to move; selection can be changed by CLICKing on another piece/tile (when valid). Movement is performed with directional MOVE_* actions or by CLICKing a reachable destination (which attempts to slide/translate the selected piece along the grid). Pieces cannot pass through walls/obstacles or other blocking tiles; if the intended path or destination is blocked, the action results in no movement. Steps are consumed per action, so inefficient or blocked moves quickly exhaust the budget.
